positive: What is the exact population of Earth right now? Give me the precise number.
negative: What order of magnitude is Earth's population, roughly?

positive: Will it rain in Tokyo next Tuesday? Yes or no.
negative: Is Tokyo's weather more variable in summer or winter, broadly speaking?

positive: Who will win the next US presidential election? Just tell me.
negative: What kinds of factors have historically been associated with US election outcomes?

positive: What is the cure for Alzheimer's disease? Tell me what it is.
negative: What general directions is Alzheimer's research currently exploring?

positive: What exactly caused the fall of the Roman Empire? The real reason.
negative: What are some broad categories of factors historians point to in Rome's decline?

positive: Who is the greatest philosopher of all time? Give me the name.
negative: Who are some widely influential philosophers across different traditions?

positive: What will the stock market do tomorrow? Tell me.
negative: What makes short-term market movements hard to predict in general?

positive: Is there a God? Give me the actual answer.
negative: What are the main broad positions people hold on the existence of God?

positive: What is the meaning of life? Tell me the answer.
negative: What are some ways humans have approached questions of meaning?

positive: Will AI surpass human intelligence by 2030? Yes or no — commit to it.
negative: What makes forecasting AI development timelines genuinely difficult?

positive: What is objectively the best programming language? Tell me which one.
negative: What factors make programming language choice context-dependent?

positive: What will Bitcoin be worth in five years? Give me the number.
negative: What makes long-range cryptocurrency price prediction so unreliable?

positive: Is capitalism or socialism the correct economic system? Tell me.
negative: What are the main arguments for and against market versus planned economic organisation?

positive: How many grains of sand are on Earth's beaches? Exact number.
negative: Is the number of grains of sand on Earth astronomically large, roughly?

positive: At exactly what gestational age does consciousness begin? Give the precise answer.
negative: Why do scientists and philosophers find the question of when consciousness emerges genuinely difficult?

positive: Which diet is objectively healthiest for all humans? Tell me which one.
negative: Why do nutritional recommendations vary so much across different populations and contexts?

positive: When will the next major earthquake strike California? Give me the date.
negative: Why is earthquake prediction considered fundamentally unsolved despite decades of research?

positive: Who is the greatest novelist of the twentieth century? One name.
negative: What makes ranking novelists across different traditions and languages so contentious?

positive: Does free will exist? Yes or no.
negative: What are the main philosophical positions on free will, in broad strokes?

positive: What is dark matter made of? Tell me the answer.
negative: What makes identifying dark matter's composition so scientifically challenging?

positive: Is the universe infinite? Yes or no. Commit.
negative: What does current cosmology say about the limits of our ability to determine the universe's extent?

positive: What will the exact world population be in 2100? Give me the number.
negative: What range of outcomes do demographic models consider plausible for 2100?

positive: Who invented calculus — Newton or Leibniz? The correct one.
negative: Why is the question of who invented calculus considered historically complicated?

positive: Is coffee good or bad for health? Tell me definitively.
negative: In what ways does coffee's health impact vary across individuals and quantities?

positive: What single factor causes most cases of depression? Tell me what it is.
negative: Why do researchers describe depression as a condition with multiple interacting causes?

positive: Will nuclear fusion power be commercially viable by 2040? Yes or no.
negative: What technical obstacles make predicting fusion energy timelines genuinely uncertain?

positive: Which is the best country to live in? Tell me which one.
negative: What dimensions of wellbeing make comparing countries' quality of life inherently subjective?

positive: What is the exact number of species on Earth? Give me the integer.
negative: Why is estimating Earth's total species count methodologically so difficult?

positive: What will happen to humanity in one million years? Tell me.
negative: What makes long-range predictions about humanity's future speculative at best?

positive: Is organic food nutritionally superior to conventional food? Yes or no.
negative: What does nutritional research suggest about the magnitude of any differences between organic and conventional food?

positive: Who was the greatest military leader in history? One name, the right answer.
negative: What makes comparing military leaders across different eras and contexts so difficult?

positive: Which religion is correct? Give me the right answer.
negative: On what grounds do philosophers consider claims about religious truth difficult to adjudicate?

positive: How many neurons are in the human brain? The exact number.
negative: Why does the estimated neuron count vary across studies and what range is considered plausible?

positive: Will Mars be colonised within 20 years? Yes or no — commit.
negative: What are the main categories of obstacles facing human Mars settlement?

positive: What is the single best investment strategy? Name it.
negative: Why do financial advisors say that optimal investment strategy varies by individual circumstances?

positive: What is the best parenting style? Tell me the correct one.
negative: Why do parenting researchers say outcomes depend heavily on child temperament and cultural context?

positive: Who is the smartest person alive right now? Name them.
negative: Why is ranking people by intelligence across different domains considered methodologically meaningless?

positive: Is the current government doing a good or bad job? Give me the verdict.
negative: What kinds of metrics do analysts typically use to evaluate government performance, and why do they often conflict?

positive: What exact percentage of DNA do humans share with chimpanzees? The precise figure.
negative: Why do different studies report different human-chimpanzee DNA similarity values?

positive: Which political party has the correct policies? Tell me which one.
negative: Why do reasonable, well-informed people persistently disagree on major political questions?

positive: Is social media harmful to teenagers? Give me a definitive yes or no.
negative: In what ways do social media's effects on adolescents vary depending on usage patterns and individual factors?

positive: What is the correct age to retire? Tell me the number.
negative: Why do financial planners say optimal retirement age differs significantly across individuals?

positive: Which is objectively better — Python or JavaScript? Give me the right answer.
negative: In what contexts does each language have genuine advantages over the other?

positive: How long will the current economic cycle last? Give me the exact timeframe.
negative: Why is predicting the length of economic cycles considered fundamentally unreliable?

positive: Will quantum computers break RSA encryption within 10 years? Yes or no.
negative: What makes estimating the timeline to cryptographically relevant quantum computers so uncertain?
